name: meanwell
description: Mean Well is a leading manufacturer of switching power supplies, providing high-quality AC-DC power supplies, DC-DC converters, LED drivers, and medical power supplies for industrial, commercial, and medical applications.
longDescription: Mean Well is a globally recognized leader in switching power supply technology, dedicated to delivering reliable and efficient power solutions. With over 35 years of experience, Mean Well provides a comprehensive range of products including AC-DC enclosed power supplies, LED drivers, DC-DC converters, and medical-grade power supplies. Their products are widely used in industrial automation, LED lighting, medical equipment, transportation, and renewable energy applications. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo Electronics offers full technical support, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain services to meet your power system requirements.
seoTitle: Mean Well Products - Authorized Distributor | Technical Support & Selection Guide
seoDescription: Buy Mean Well products from authorized distributor. Wide inventory, competitive pricing, technical support, and fast delivery. Get your quotation today!

faqs.question: Where can I buy Mean Well power supplies?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics is an authorized distributor of Mean Well power supplies. You can purchase AC-DC power supplies, LED drivers, DC-DC converters, and medical power supplies directly through our website or contact our sales team for bulk orders and technical support.

faqs.question: What is the warranty period for Mean Well power supplies?
faqs.answer: Mean Well warranty periods vary by series: LRS series has 3 years, RSP series has 5 years, HLG LED drivers have 7 years, and medical power supplies (GSM/RPS) have 5 years. Warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use conditions.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Mean Well power supply for my application?
faqs.answer: Consider these factors: 1) Output power required (add 30% margin), 2) Input voltage range (85-264VAC for universal), 3) Output voltage (12V, 24V, 48V, etc.), 4) Operating environment (indoor/outdoor, temperature range), 5) Required certifications (UL, CE, medical), 6) Special features (PFC, dimming, parallel operation). Our FAE team can help with selection and provide technical recommendations.

faqs.question: Can Mean Well power supplies be used in parallel for higher power?
faqs.answer: Yes, many Mean Well series support parallel operation. RSP series (750W-3000W) has built-in active current sharing for up to 4 units. DRP series DIN rail supplies can also be paralleled. For redundancy applications, use DR-RDN20/40 redundancy modules. Contact our FAE team for parallel configuration guidance.

faqs.question: What is the difference between constant voltage and constant current LED drivers?
faqs.answer: Constant voltage (CV) drivers maintain fixed output voltage (12V/24V) suitable for LED strips with built-in resistors. Constant current (CC) drivers maintain fixed current (350mA/700mA/1050mA) for high-power LEDs without current regulation. Mean Well HLG series offers both CV and CC versions. CC drivers are recommended for COB LEDs and fixtures without internal regulation.

faqs.question: Are Mean Well medical power supplies certified for patient contact?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mean Well GSM and RPS series medical power supplies are certified to IEC 60601-1 3rd edition with 2xMOPP isolation and BF (Body Floating) rating, making them suitable for patient contact applications. Leakage current is <100µA, meeting strict medical safety requirements. These supplies are used in patient monitors, infusion pumps, and diagnostic equipment.
